reasoning: Addressing your primary limiter, which is lactate clearance and fatigue resistance, is crucial here. Your last ride showed low overall intensity, so this session will challenge your ability to handle sustained power increases as required on the Alpine Loop's main climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 10 min @ 209W, then 2 min @ 245W, repeat 2 more times. Focus on controlled breathing and rhythm.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
